latent_knowledge_nodes.description: ASA Nexus v5.5 implements a fully modular architecture with specialized managers (System, File, Search) and a 3-tier Cascade Router (Free/Haiku/Sonnet) for token optimization.
NIL v2 replaces SQLite with JSON-based persistence (nexus_latent_state.json) for high-density knowledge mapping and easier IA/Human readability.
Implements command whitelisting in SystemManager.js and path traversal protection in FileManager.js to secure autonomous agentic loops.
Essential infrastructure and configuration files for the ASA NEXUS ecosystem.
Este es un nodo de prueba para la resonancia de la v7.
